title: ObjectWindowEvent
description: event representing a window of time an object was meeting some criteria

entryTf.description: the world transform of the object when the window opened

exitTf.description: the world transform of the object when the window closed

entryStamp.description: the time in nanoseconds after sim start that the window opened

exitStamp.description: the time in nanoseconds after sim start that the windows closed

wasTriggeredByEntry.description: true indicates this event was emitted for the start of the window
